# Baseline `/speckit-analyze` Report — 001-superspec-baseline

**Date**: 2026-04-30
**Generated by**: T014 cross-artifact consistency scan(`/speckit-analyze`)
**Scope**: `specs/001-superspec-baseline/` 全套(`spec.md` / `plan.md` / `tasks.md` / `research.md` /
`data-model.md` / `contracts/` 5 個 / `quickstart.md`)+ `.specify/memory/constitution.md` v1.0.0

> 本掃描為 read-only,不修改任何工件;任何 finding 修補應於後續分開 commit 處理。

## Constitution Alignment Issues

無 violation。`plan.md` Constitution Check 五原則皆 ✅ 對齊;沒有 deviation 需 Complexity Tracking 表。

| Principle                                     | 對齊狀態 | T-task 對應                                  |
| --------------------------------------------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| I. Test-First Development (NON-NEGOTIABLE)    | ✅       | T002(既有 vitest 4 / 7 file / 20 tests pass) |
| II. Observability by Default                  | ✅       | T002 / T011                                  |
| III. Container-First Dev + Per-Runtime Deploy | ✅       | T002 / T004(make up healthcheck)             |
| IV. Type Safety End-to-End                    | ✅       | T002(typecheck)/ FR-022 aspirational         |
| V. Spec-Driven Development                    | ✅       | T009 / T014(本 task)                         |

## Extension Hooks(after_analyze 提示)

`.specify/extensions.yml` 定義 `after_analyze` optional hook:`speckit.git.commit`(描述「Commit analysis results?」)。依 project CLAUDE.md「commit 由 user 指示」規範,**本 report 不自動 commit**。如要 commit 此 report 與已積累的 working-tree 變更,user 可在後續手動下 `commit`(由 controller 草擬訊息 + 列 staging 範圍)。
